overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting characters navigating a dystopian urban environment engulfed in thick orange smog. The group ascends stairs past the NCART transit station, traverses underpasses, and crosses a foggy intersection with other pedestrians in Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance plaza with neon signage

events.description: exiting covered stairwell into open plaza area with NCART station visible
reaching top of stairs and continuing forward toward transit entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs with two companions, approaching the NCART transit station entrance

notable_agents.action: two companions walking alongside ego up the stairs
pedestrian standing near the NCART entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit' with blue and yellow coloring
wide concrete staircase with metal railings on both sides
open concrete plaza area in front of the transit station entrance
large planters with spiky vegetation near the station entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the group ascending a wide concrete staircase through thick orange haze. They emerge into a semi-covered plaza dominated by the illuminated NCART transit station sign. Metal railings line the stairs, and sparse vegetation in planters decorates the station entrance area.

events.description: turning left away from NCART station entrance
descending stairs into covered underpass area beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: turning left past the NCART station and descending stairs into the shadowy underpass

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete overpass with thick support pillars
metal safety railings along the descending staircase
tall street light poles with dual lamps

segments.scene_description: The group turns left away from the NCART station and descends a second set of stairs into a dimly lit underpass. The environment becomes enclosed beneath massive concrete overpass structures, with street lamps visible through the haze. The open plaza and transit signage disappear behind as they enter the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: emerging from underpass into open foggy street with reduced visibility
passing a shirtless pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk beside a concrete wall, passing pedestrians in the thick orange haze

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian walking opposite direction carrying items, passing close to camera

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
asphalt road with lane markings visible through the haze
large vertical billboard mounted on the building facade above the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered concrete retaining wall, the group moves through the thick orange smog. Street lamps recede into the distance on the left, while the road runs parallel. The environment feels enclosed despite being outdoors due to the dense haze and high walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: approaching traffic light and crosswalk at intersection
beginning to cross the street with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the wide street with a crowd of other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in red and orange outfits crossing the street together
car driving through the intersection with headlights on in the fog

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signal lights and pedestrian crossing signals
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
wide open intersection area with multiple crossing paths
massive brutalist concrete structures framing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the group approaches a crosswalk. Traffic lights and crossing signals become prominent on the left. The group joins other pedestrians crossing the street through the thick orange haze, with vehicles visible in the distance and massive concrete buildings looming on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a smog-choked urban corridor that transitions from an elevated transit hub down into a claustrophobic underpass and finally into a wide city intersection. It begins with the group ascending a wide concrete staircase through thick orange haze, emerging into a semi-covered plaza beneath an illuminated NCART transit station sign. As the group turns away from the station, the camera descends a second set of stairs into a dimly lit underpass, where the open plaza is replaced by massive, enclosing concrete overpass structures. The scene then shifts to a narrow sidewalk alongside a graffiti-covered retaining wall, moving through the dense smog as street lamps recede into the distance. Finally, the environment opens up into a wide intersection where the group joins other pedestrians at a crosswalk, surrounded by looming concrete buildings and distant vehicles veiled in the orange haze.
